description.Funciones del cargo: Create and manage the marketing deliverables timeline from kickoff to delivery, ensuring alignment across all milestones.Schedule and track key project checkpoints: product/design handoff, marketing briefs, copy deadlines, creative reviews, and web/PDP/PLP approvals.Maintain and update the shared integrated marketing calendar with GTM deadlines and launch details.Provide regular progress reports, ensuring transparency and proactively addressing blockers.Manage product samples logistics—placing and tracking orders, monitoring inventory, and coordinating with Tech Design and Sourcing for photoshoots and influencer content.Partner closely with Brand, Creative, Growth, Product, and Operations to align project needs and ensure cross-functional clarity.Create, distribute, and manage trackers for visibility and accountability across teams.Maintain rigorous organization of all project documents, assets, and files for easy access and long-term reference.
description.Requerimientos del cargo: 3+ years of Project Management or Marketing Operations experience at a fast-growing ecommerce companyEnglish language proficiencyYou thrive on organization, structure, and details, and love building systems that make complex projects feel seamless.You’re collaborative and approachable, with the ability to manage cross-functional relationships at all levels.Unshakable ability to manage multiple projects without letting anything slip through the cracks.Strong understanding of marketing workflows, creative processes, and project management tools like Asana and FigmaPerformance mindset with ability to proactively present risks, opportunities and solutionsThrives in fast-paced startup environments and comfortable rolling up sleevesYou have the mentality of work smarter, not harder
description.Beneficios: Proficiency in Asana and Figma; knowledge of eCommerce industry dynamics; proven ability to lead cross-functional teams; strong leadership, problem-solving, and decision-making capabilities; excellent written and verbal communication; creative thinking and attention to detail; adaptability to changing priorities and fast deadlines.
description.Conditions: Oportunidad de crecimiento con un equipo multinivelVacaciones y feriadosFlexibilidad y autonomíaPago USDTrabajo remoto - Latam
